zh.lifeSummary: 當Thierry de Mousson Comte de Montbelaird於從1076年到1078年出生在法國洛萊姆斯巴勒迪克時，他的父親Thierry Ier de Montbéliard comte de Bar33歲，母親Ermentrude de Bourgogne20歲。他至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1163年1月在法國布格-福朗-可特艾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thierry de Mousson Comte de Montbelaird于从1076年到1078年出生在法国洛萊姆斯巴勒迪克时，他的父亲Thierry Ier de Montbéliard comte de Bar33岁，母亲Ermentrude de Bourgogne20岁。他至少有1个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1163年1月在法国布格-福朗-可特艾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mousson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Chantal, Gaston, Monique.
French: from Old French pousson, a spirit made from linseed oil or hemp, hence a metonymic occupational name for someone who made this. In the US, this surname is found mainly in LA.
History: Jean-Bertrand Pousson from Lespiteau in Haute-Garonne, France, married Joséphine Guillory in Opelousas, LA, in 1843.

nameMeanings.name: Thierry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Germanic Theodoric, composed of elements meaning ‘people’ and ‘rule’. Compare Terry .

en.lifeSummary: When Thierry de Mousson Comte de Montbelaird was born from 1076 to 1078, in Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, France, his father, Thierry Ier de Montbéliard comte de Bar, was 33 and his mother, Ermentrude de Bourgogne, was 20. He had at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died in January 1163, in Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thierry de Mousson Comte de Montbelaird est né du 1076 au 1078, à Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, France, son père, Thierry Ier de Montbéliard comte de Bar, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Ermentrude de Bourgogne, avait 20 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en janvier 1163, à Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thierry de Mousson Comte de Montbelaird von 1076 bis 1078 in Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lothringen, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thierry Ier de Montbéliard comte de Bar 33 und seine Mutter Ermentrude de Bourgogne 20. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb im Januar 1163 in Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thierry de Mousson Comte de Montbelaird è nato il da 1076 a 1078 nel Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, il suo padre, Thierry Ier de Montbéliard comte de Bar, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Ermentrude de Bourgogne, aveva 20 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel gennaio 1163, nel Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Thierry de Mousson Comte de Montbelairdがから1076年まで1078年にフランスロレィヌメウゼバー-レ-ドウックで生まれた時，父Thierry Ier de Montbéliard comte de Barは33歳，母Ermentrude de Bourgogneは20歳であった。彼は少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1163年1月にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thierry de Mousson Comte de Montbelaird(이)가 1076년 부터 1078년 까지 프랑스 로레이인 우스 바-레-드크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thierry Ier de Montbéliard comte de Bar(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Ermentrude de Bourgogne(은)는 20세였다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1163년 1월 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e에서 사망했다.

lv.from 1076 to 1078–January 1163: no 1076. gada līdz 1078. gadam–1163. gada janvāris

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thierry de Mousson Comte de Montbelaird nasceu de 1076 a 1078, em Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, França, seu pai, Thierry Ier de Montbéliard comte de Bar, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Ermentrude de Bourgogne, tinha 20 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em janeiro de 1163, em Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thierry de Mousson Comte de Montbelaird родился с 1076 по 1078 в местности бар-ле-дук, меус, лорреаин, Франция, его отцу по имени Thierry Ier de Montbéliard comte de Bar было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Ermentrude de Bourgogne, 20. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер январь 1163 г. в местности бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thierry de Mousson Comte de Montbelaird nació desde 1076 hasta 1078, en Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, su papá, Thierry Ier de Montbéliard comte de Bar, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Ermentrude de Bourgogne, tenía 20 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en enero de 1163, en Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia.
